messages.content: Make a parallel timeline of the Windows system which changes names, adds new systems and different release years

1. Windows 1.0 (1985) - the first version of the Windows operating system, featuring a graphical user interface and multitasking capabilities.
2. Windows 2.0 (1987) - introduced support for expanded memory, improved graphics and new applications.
3. Windows 3.0 (1990) - brought significant improvements in performance, graphics and applications, including the introduction of program manager and file manager.
4. Windows 95 (1995) - a major release with a revamped user interface, introduction of the Start menu, taskbar and support for plug and play devices.
5. Windows 98 (1998) - introduced improved performance, support for USB devices, Internet Explorer 4.0 and the FAT32 file system.
6. Windows 2000 (2000) - targeted at business users with enhanced security, stability and support for new technologies.
7. Windows XP (2001) - brought a more user-friendly interface, improved performance, new features like system restore and built-in firewall.
8. Windows Vista (2007) - introduced a new visual style, improved security features and better multimedia capabilities.
9. Windows 7 (2009) - focused on performance improvements, enhanced taskbar and touch-screen support.
10. Windows 8 (2012) - introduced a new touch-friendly interface, app store and cloud integration.
11. Windows 10 (2015) - brought back the Start menu, introduced virtual desktops, Cortana voice assistant and universal apps.
12. Windows 11 (2021) - the latest version of Windows, featuring a redesigned Start menu, improved performance and security features.
Change the names to include incrementing numbers
Replace with single numbers beginning with a certain system randomly.
Actually I meant replace the float with single numbers beginning with a certain random system

1. Windows 95 (1995)
2. Windows 98 (1998)

4. Windows Vista (2007)

7. Windows 10 (2015)
8. Windows 11 (2021)
